channel.title: Playbook on Adler Medrado's corner of the web
channel.description: Recent content in Playbook on Adler Medrado's corner of the web

item.title: Ollama Local AI Playbook
item.description: Running AI models locally on your Mac M1 is easier than you think. No cloud. No expensive subscriptions. No unnecessary complexity. Just your own hardware and full control. I just released a 30-minute playbook that shows exactly how to run Ollama fully local on Mac M1: Full install guide Copy-paste terminal commands Model recommendations tested on M1 hardware Performance optimization tips Local security checklist Bonus cheat sheet included Launch price: $5
